# Reflect.fi

> Reflection Token Launchpad on Bitcoin L1 via OPNet

## About

Reflect.fi is a decentralized launchpad for creating reflection tokens on Bitcoin Layer 1 using the OPNet smart contract platform. Reflection tokens automatically distribute a percentage of every transfer to all existing holders, creating passive yield simply from holding.

## How It Works

1. Users configure token parameters (name, symbol, supply, tax rate)
2. A ReflectToken smart contract (OP20 standard) is deployed on Bitcoin L1 via OPNet
3. Every transfer of the token deducts a configurable tax (in basis points)
4. The tax is redistributed proportionally to all holders based on their balance
5. No staking, no claiming — rewards accrue automatically

## Pages

- [Home](https://reflect-fi.vercel.app): Overview, stats, and getting started
- [Launch](https://reflect-fi.vercel.app/launch): Deploy a new reflection token
- [Explore](https://reflect-fi.vercel.app/explore): Browse all deployed tokens

## Technical Details

- **Blockchain**: Bitcoin L1
- **Smart Contract Platform**: OPNet (Tapscript-encoded calldata)
- **Token Standard**: OP20 (ERC20 equivalent for Bitcoin)
- **Network**: OPNet Testnet (Signet fork)
- **Contract**: ReflectToken (WASM-compiled TypeScript)
- **RPC**: https://testnet.opnet.org

## Key Features

- One-click token deployment
- Configurable tax rates (0-50% in basis points)
- Automatic holder reward distribution
- On-chain block scanner for token discovery
- Real-time wallet connection via OP_WALLET
- Transaction tracking on mempool.opnet.org and opscan.org

## Source Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/bc1plainview/reflect-fi)

## Contact

Built for the OPNet hackathon.
